고린도후서 6:1.content: Working together, we entreat also that you do not receive the grace of God in vain,

고린도후서 6:2.content: for he says, “At an acceptable time I listened to you. In a day of salvation I helped you.” Behold, now is the acceptable time. Behold, now is the day of salvation.

고린도후서 6:3.content: We give no occasion of stumbling in anything, that our service may not be blamed,

고린도후서 6:4.content: but in everything commending ourselves, as servants of God, in great endurance, in afflictions, in hardships, in distresses,

고린도후서 6:5.content: in beatings, in imprisonments, in riots, in labors, in watchings, in fastings;

고린도후서 6:6.content: in pureness, in knowledge, in perseverance, in kindness, in the Holy Spirit, in sincere love,

고린도후서 6:7.content: in the word of truth, in the power of God; by the armor of righteousness on the right hand and on the left,

고린도후서 6:8.content: by glory and dishonor, by evil report and good report; as deceivers, and yet true;

고린도후서 6:9.content: as unknown, and yet well known; as dying, and behold, we live; as punished, and not killed;

고린도후서 6:10.content: as sorrowful, yet always rejoicing; as poor, yet making many rich; as having nothing, and yet possessing all things.

고린도후서 6:11.content: Our mouth is open to you, Corinthians. Our heart is enlarged.

고린도후서 6:12.content: You are not restricted by us, but you are restricted by your own affections.

고린도후서 6:13.content: Now in return, I speak as to my children: you also open your hearts.

고린도후서 6:14.content: Don’t be unequally yoked with unbelievers, for what fellowship do righteousness and iniquity have? Or what fellowship does light have with darkness?

고린도후서 6:15.content: What agreement does Christ have with Belial? Or what portion does a believer have with an unbeliever?

고린도후서 6:16.content: What agreement does a temple of God have with idols? For you are a temple of the living God. Even as God said, “I will dwell in them and walk in them. I will be their God and they will be my people.”

고린도후서 6:17.content: Therefore “ ‘Come out from among them, and be separate,’ says the Lord. ‘Touch no unclean thing. I will receive you.

고린도후서 6:18.content: I will be to you a Father. You will be to me sons and daughters,’ says the Lord Almighty.”
